task_description: Fix 4 residual bugs from PRs #10 and #11: (1) TypeScript type Option.series missing UX_EXPANDED/BX_EXPANDED, (2) UX_EXPANDED/BX_EXPANDED blades invisible in combo form tab, (3) phantom selection when switching manufacturer filter, (4) orphaned database rows whales-wave and bit-disc-ball need cleanup in seed script

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly (npx tsc --noEmit passes). No test framework exists in the project. All 4 bugs confirmed fixed. Review v2 approved.
